declarations.description:
Purpose: Component for displaying a link in a button style.
Category: Navigation
When to use: When you need a button that looks like a link.
When not to use: When you need a standard button.
Works with components: all components
Alternative component names: Link Button, Hyperlink Button, Anchor Button, Text Button, Inline Button
declarations.name: McLinkButton

cssParts.description: for changing visuals of text and icons container
cssParts.name: `text-and-icon`

cssParts.description: for changing visuals of label text
cssParts.name: `text-and-icon-label`

cssParts.description: for changing visuals of sublabel text
cssParts.name: `text-and-icon-sublabel`

slots.description: The default slot for the `button`. Used to display custom text/icon in the middle of the button.
The icon HTML to use for the `button`.
slots.name: `icon`

slots.description: The trailing icon HTML to use for the `button`.
slots.name: `trailingicon`

events.description: Emitted when the button is clicked.
events.name: `click`

events.description: Emitted when the button is focused.
events.name: `focus`

events.description: Emitted when the button is blurred.
events.name: `blur`
